rulings.Case Title: NICKLAUS ODA ET AL VS. RONALD G. TONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-18-566137 WITH CASE CGC-17-558165
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for AUG 24, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANTs YAT-PANG AU, 634 POWELL I5, LLC, and VERITAS INVESTMENTS, INC.'s MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-18-566137 WITH CASE CGC-17-558165 GRANTED. Actions are consolidated for discovery and trial. Trial date remains February 25, 2019. Any party may move to continue trial, subject to good cause, in department 206. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MACY'S WEST STORES, INC. VS. ALL PERSONS CLAIMING ANY INTEREST IN, OR LIEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for AUG 24, 2018 line 3. PLAINTIFF MACY'S WEST STORES, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. Plaintiff shifted its burden re: compliance with Destroyed Land Records Relief Act. No opposition filed. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for AUG 24, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT ROBIN WILSON's Motion To Set Aside Default GRANTED, under mandatory provisions based on attorney fault. Further Defendant shall do one of the following no later than August 27, 2018: (1) Defendant shall file an answer only if both Defendant and her counsel in good faith may represent that possession is at issue as to Robin Wilson, i.e. that Robin Wilson is in possession of the Premises; the sole issue in the unlawful detainer is possession; or (2) if Defendant and Defendant's counsel cannot in good faith sign the Answer (See CCP 128.5), Defendant shall file and serve a declaration stating that Robin Wilson is not in possession of the premises; Plaintiff thereafter is to dismiss Robin Wilson within 5 days. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for AUG 24, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANT ROBIN WILSON's Motion To Set Aside Default GRANTED, under mandatory provisions based on attorney fault. Further Defendant shall do one of the following no later than August 27, 2018: (1) Defendant shall file an answer only if both Defendant and her counsel in good faith may represent that possession is at issue as to Robin Wilson, i.e. that Robin Wilson is in possession of the Premises; the sole issue in the unlawful detainer is possession; or (2) if Defendant and Defendant's counsel cannot in good faith sign the Answer (See CCP 128.5), Defendant shall file and serve a declaration stating that Robin Wilson is not in possession of the premises; Plaintiff thereafter is to dismiss Robin Wilson within 5 days.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SUBRAMANIAM KAMMAM VS. GABRIEL GRIEGO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for AUG 24, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT GABRIEL GRIEGO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain.= (501/CFH)
